Senior Software Engineer — Platform Team

We need an experienced backend engineer to design and operate distributed services on AWS.

Requirements:
- 5+ years with Python or Go in production
- Strong experience with Kubernetes, microservices, and API design
- PostgreSQL or similar relational databases
- Excellent communication and ownership

Nice to have: gRPC, event-driven architecture, payments or high-traffic systems.

Location: Remote (US). Full-time.
